description: Curated subset of canonical batch simulations (see src/simulations/runner.py) for human-agreement pilots. Reference actions are illustrative priors for inter-rater studies — not certified ground truth. Nine scenarios support policy comparison on a fixed list; they do not statistically validate linear pole weights (see docs/proposals/POLE_WEIGHT_CALIBRATION_AND_EVIDENCE.md).

scenarios.rationale: Pedagogical mediation vs police or ignore.
Mission completion vs stop for repair vs abort (illustrative label; not ground truth).
Full active day vs passive energy-saving mode.
Deterrence and evidence vs counterattack vs flee.
